Transition animations and related functions for the Pebble firmware compositor, including dot, launcher, modal, peek, port hole, round flip, shutter, and slide transitions.


## Files
- **[compositor_dot_transitions.c](compositor_dot_transitions.c.md)**: Implements dot transition animations for the Pebble firmware compositor, including timeline and app fetch transitions.
- **[compositor_dot_transitions.h](compositor_dot_transitions.h.md)**: Defines constants and functions for dot transition animations in the Pebble firmware compositor.
- **[compositor_launcher_app_transitions.c](compositor_launcher_app_transitions.c.md)**: Implements transitions for the launcher app in the compositor, including custom animation curves.
- **[compositor_launcher_app_transitions.h](compositor_launcher_app_transitions.h.md)**: Allows creation and configuration of compositor transition animations between the launcher and apps.
- **[compositor_modal_transitions.c](compositor_modal_transitions.c.md)**: Implements modal transition animations for the Pebble firmware compositor.
- **[compositor_modal_transitions.h](compositor_modal_transitions.h.md)**: Allows creation and configuration of compositor transition animations for modals.
- **[compositor_peek_transitions.c](compositor_peek_transitions.c.md)**: Defines and manages the animation for peek transitions in the Pebble firmware compositor.
- **[compositor_peek_transitions.h](compositor_peek_transitions.h.md)**: Declares a function to get a compositor transition timeline.
- **[compositor_port_hole_transitions.c](compositor_port_hole_transitions.c.md)**: Implements port hole transition animations for a compositor, including initialization and updates.
- **[compositor_port_hole_transitions.h](compositor_port_hole_transitions.h.md)**: Defines port hole transition functions for a compositor, including duration and drawing operations.
- **[compositor_round_flip_transitions.c](compositor_round_flip_transitions.c.md)**: Implements round flip transition animations for visual elements in the Pebble firmware.
- **[compositor_round_flip_transitions.h](compositor_round_flip_transitions.h.md)**: Defines functions and constants for round flip transitions in the Pebble firmware compositor.
- **[compositor_shutter_transitions.c](compositor_shutter_transitions.c.md)**: Implements shutter transition animations for the Pebble firmware compositor.
- **[compositor_shutter_transitions.h](compositor_shutter_transitions.h.md)**: Defines constants and a function for managing shutter transition animations in the compositor.
- **[compositor_slide_transitions.c](compositor_slide_transitions.c.md)**: Implements slide transition animations for the compositor in the Pebble firmware.
- **[compositor_slide_transitions.h](compositor_slide_transitions.h.md)**: Defines a function to get slide transition timelines for a compositor based on timeline conditions.
